description: Create packages/quant-flow - AI filmmaking toolkit with scene composition, shot sequencing, audio scoring, and vibe-coded presets. This is a new package in the monorepo.
steps: 1. Create packages/quant-flow/package.json following the pattern from generative-media (name: @quant/quant-flow, same devDependencies, scripts for typecheck/test/build/lint).
2. Create packages/quant-flow/tsconfig.json matching generative-media tsconfig (composite, ES2022, outDir dist, rootDir src, vitest/globals types).
3. Create packages/quant-flow/vitest.config.ts matching generative-media (globals: true, environment: node).

4. Create packages/quant-flow/src/types.ts with types: Scene (id, description, visualPrompt, duration, transitions), Shot (sceneId, cameraAngle, framing, motion), Storyboard (shots array, totalDuration, style), AudioScore (type: music|sfx|voiceover, prompt, duration, startAt), FilmProject (id, title, storyboard, scores, vibePreset, status), VibePreset (name 'cinematic'|'documentary'|'social'|'meme', colorGrading, pacing, transitions, musicStyle), RenderResult (projectId, outputUri, duration, resolution).

5. Create packages/quant-flow/src/scene-composer.ts - SceneComposer class with methods: composeFromText(text) -> Scene[] (parse narrative into scenes), composeFromPrompts(prompts: string[]) -> Scene[] (one scene per prompt), setTransitions(scenes, style) -> Scene[].

6. Create packages/quant-flow/src/shot-sequencer.ts - ShotSequencer class: fromStoryboard(scenes) -> Shot[] (generate shot list), reorder(shots, newOrder) -> Shot[], addTransition(shotA, shotB, type) -> Shot[].

7. Create packages/quant-flow/src/audio-scorer.ts - AudioScorer class: generateScore(project: FilmProject) -> AudioScore[] (produce music/sfx tracks for each scene), matchVibeMusic(vibePreset) -> AudioScore, addVoiceover(text, startAt, duration) -> AudioScore.

8. Create packages/quant-flow/src/vibe-presets.ts - exported preset definitions for cinematic, documentary, social, meme. Each defines colorGrading, pacing, transitions, musicStyle. Export getPreset(name) and listPresets() functions.

9. Create packages/quant-flow/src/film-renderer.ts - FilmRenderer class: render(project: FilmProject) -> RenderResult (orchestrate generation of all shots + audio into final output), getProgress(projectId) -> { percent: number, stage: string }.
10. Create packages/quant-flow/src/index.ts exporting all public API: types, SceneComposer, ShotSequencer, AudioScorer, FilmRenderer, vibe preset functions.
11. Create packages/quant-flow/src/__tests__/scene-composer.test.ts - test text parsing into scenes, multi-prompt composition, transition application.
12. Create packages/quant-flow/src/__tests__/shot-sequencer.test.ts - test shot generation from storyboard, reordering, transitions.
13. Create packages/quant-flow/src/__tests__/vibe-presets.test.ts - test all 4 presets load correctly, list function returns all, unknown preset throws.
14. Run: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm install && pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/quant-flow && pnpm test --filter=@quant/quant-flow
acceptance_criteria: Package compiles cleanly with tsc --noEmit in strict mode
SceneComposer parses text into structured scenes with visual prompts
ShotSequencer generates shot lists from scenes
AudioScorer produces scores matching vibe presets
All 4 vibe presets (cinematic, documentary, social, meme) are defined and loadable
FilmRenderer orchestrates render with progress tracking
All tests pass via vitest run
verification: source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm install && pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/quant-flow
source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && pnpm test --filter=@quant/quant-flow
